jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.description: Work on new features for our main product using JavaScript and React. Collaborate with designers and backend developers to deliver high-quality UI.

jobs.title: Backend Developer
jobs.description: Join our team to build scalable server-side applications using Node.js and Express. Ensure system performance, reliability, and security.

jobs.title: UI/UX Designer
jobs.description: Design user-centric interfaces for web and mobile applications. Work closely with developers to ensure designs are implemented accurately.

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.description: Analyze large datasets to build predictive models. Collaborate with engineers to integrate machine learning solutions into products.

jobs.title: Project Manager
jobs.description: Lead project teams to deliver software solutions on time and within budget. Facilitate agile ceremonies and stakeholder communication.
